data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures the privacy and security of user data during transmission between devices and servers.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL protocols implemented across all communication channels.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: YouTube employs a suite of AI-driven tools to detect and mitigate security threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Behavioral analysis and anomaly detection systems.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: An extra layer of security to prevent unauthorized access to user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports various methods of authentication, including authenticator apps and SMS.

data.title: Abuse and Spam Prevention
data.description: Machine learning algorithms are used to identify and mitigate spam content and abuse.
data.technical_spec: NLP and pattern recognition models constantly updated with new threat intelligence.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Regular internal and external audits to ensure compliance with security best practices and standards.
data.technical_spec: Industry-standard techniques and tools employed for vulnerability assessments.
